REG - TR Property Inv. - Result of AGM
data.description:
RNS Number : 6521N TR Property Investment Trust PLC 23 July 2026  

LONDON STOCK EXCHANGE ANNOUNCEMENT

TR PROPERTY INVESTMENT TRUST PLC

RESULTS OF ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING

LEI: 549300BPGCCN3ETPQD32

Information disclosed in accordance with LR 6.4.13

Results of Annual General Meeting

Following the Annual General Meeting of the Company held today, 23 July 2026, the Board is pleased to announce that all the Ordinary Resolutions put to shareholders were voted on by poll and passed. In addition, the following items of special business were voted on by poll and passed, which:

Ordinary Resolution:

12.  allow the Directors of the Company to exercise all the powers of the Company to allot shares in the Company and to grant rights to subscribe for, or to convert any security into, shares in the Company up to a nominal value of £26,181,455 (being approximately 33% of the total issued share capital of the Company) provided that this authority shall expire at the conclusion of the Annual General Meeting of the Company in 2027 (or, if earlier, at the close of business on 22 October 2027).

Special Resolutions:

13.  allow the Directors of the Company to exercise all powers of the Company to allot shares in the Company and/or sell treasury shares up to an aggregate nominal amount of £7,933,774, representing approximately 10% of the Company's issued Ordinary share capital as at the date of the passing of the resolution, on a non-pre-emptive basis; and

14.  allow the Company to make market purchases of up to 47,570,911 Ordinary shares of 25p each, representing 14.99% of the Company's issued share capital.

The full text of all the resolutions can be found in the Notice of Annual General Meeting set out in Annual Report for the year ended 31 March 2026, copies of which are available on the Company's website www.trproperty.com. The Annual Report is also available for viewing at https://data.fca.org.uk/#/nsm/nationalstoragemechanism

A copy of the poll results will shortly be available on the Company's website, www.trproperty.com

http://www.hemscott.com/nsm.do

23 July 2026

For further information please contact:

Jonathan Latter

For and on behalf of Columbia Threadneedle Investment Business Limited,

Company Secretary

Telephone: 020 7464 5000






http://www.hemscott.com/nsm.doThis information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. data.title: Seshaasai Technologies June-Quarter Consol Profit 603.4 Million Rupees
FatPipe publishes CEO letter on S-3 filing, affirms ATM not yet used
data.description:
FatPipe published a CEO letter clarifying its Form S-3 registration and saying the ATM program has not been used.

Key Highlights:

  • Filed a Form S-3 to give the company flexibility to raise capital for accretive acquisitions or large customer orders.
  • CEO says the ATM at-the-market program has not been used and no shares have been issued or sold under it to date.
  • Any use of the ATM will consider capital needs, market conditions, strategic fit and shareholders’ best interests.
  • Management reiterates focus on executing strategy, expanding customers/partners and delivering networking and cybersecurity solutions.

Original SEC Filing: Fatpipe Inc/UT [ FATN ] - 8-K - Jul. 23, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: Issue of Equity
data.description:
Invesco Bond Income Plus Limited

HEADLINE: Issue of Equity

The Board of Invesco Bond Income Plus Limited (the ‘Company’) announces that it has agreed today to issue and allot 100,000 ordinary shares of no par value in the Company at a price of 170.67p per share under its block listing facility. This allotment is to satisfy secondary market demand and is made under the annual authority granted by the Company’s shareholders for such allotments. These shares will rank pari passu with the existing shares in issue in all respects.

Following this issue the total number of ordinary shares in issue is 287,434,911 which should be used as the denominator for calculating interests in the Company.

Issued for and on behalf of Invesco Bond Income Plus Limited.

Contact:

Claire Brazenall

JTC Fund Solutions (Jersey) Limited

Telephone: 01534 700000

23 July 2026

data.description:

Half-Year Results - Heathrow Funding Limited

Notice is hereby given that the half-year results of Heathrow Funding Limited for the six months ended 30 June 2026 have been published and are available on the Heathrow website at www.heathrow.com

The annual report and accounts and have been submitted in full unedited text to the National Storage Mechanism and will shortly be available for inspection at https://data.fca.org.uk/#/nsm/nationalstoragemechanism.
